auth.loginSubtitle: Access your dashboard and your project's.
auth.closedRegistration: Registration is closed. If you have an invitation, use the link you received.

shell.newsAlert: Hi! Since CINEPACK is in BETA, we are building a new section with news, tips, a blog and a place to give you an even more complete service in this workspace. We hope you can enjoy it soon. See you there!

nav.askIaPlaceholder: Hi! Since CINEPACK is in BETA, we're still building this feature to give you a more complete service in this workspace. I hope to be available for you soon to help you save time. See you soon!
nav.clientView: Client / production company view · Read only
nav.clientNote: This is a read-only view meant to share the project status with clients and production companies. It does not include internal department tools or editing options.
nav.pulsoNote: {pulso} is your day and what the team expects of you, plus the overall project summary: pending tasks and alerts across all departments, overall checklist progress and budget status. {generales} are the tools shared across the whole project; under {departamento} and {exclusivas} you have yours according to your role.

comunicados.label: Announcements
comunicados.desc: Internal notices and messages for the team.

notificaciones.label: Notifications
notificaciones.desc: Global alert center for the project.

guion.label: Script
guion.desc: Literary script shared with the team.

guiontec.label: Shooting script
guiontec.desc: Breakdown by sequence and technical shot.

plan.label: Shooting schedule
plan.desc: Daily schedule of scenes and locations.

orden.label: Shooting order
orden.desc: Sequence optimized by location and resources.

espacio.label: Workspace
espacio.desc: Notes and work blocks by department.

visionado.label: Screening
visionado.desc: Gallery of materials and visual references.

equipo.label: Crew
equipo.desc: Full list of technical and artistic crew.

accesos.label: Access
accesos.desc: Manage permissions by role and tool.

contactos.label: Emergency contacts
contactos.desc: Key phone numbers and contacts for emergencies.

wrap.label: Wrap checklist
wrap.desc: Control list for closing out the shoot.

espacio.title: Workspace
espacio.subtitle: Create a personal tool.
espacio.styleHint: Tap one to create it. It starts with this structure; you can edit everything later.
espacio.created: ✓ Created. Name it from inside and find it in the Exclusive tab.
espacio.errCreate: The tool could not be created.

minimalista.d: One thin line, all the air possible.

grid-clasico.d: Thin rows and columns, no frills.

timeline.d: Horizontal rows with a color marker.

mosaico.d: Each cell is a status swatch.

checklist-tabla.d: Rows with a status mark on the left.

hp.emptyHint: Use "{name}" to log your department's info. Each row is an entry with the defined fields.
hp.confirmDeleteRows: Delete {n, plural, one {# row} other {# rows}}?
hp.fillDownHint: Copy values from the first selected row to the rest
hp.editRows: Edit {n, plural, one {# row} other {# rows}}:
hp.startAddingRow: Add the first row to get started.
hp.waitForData: Data will appear here once the department adds it.
hp.confirmDeletePersonal: Delete this personal tool and all its data?
hp.noDeptToolsDesc: This department doesn't have shared tools in the map yet.
hp.noExclusiveToolsDesc: This department doesn't have role-exclusive tools in the map yet.

herr.ej-pagos-nominas: Payments, payroll, petty cash & expense reports
herr.foto-marcas-foco: Focus distances & marks table by take
herr.foto-dit-color: Color report & LUTs applied by scene

comunicados.emptyDesc: The team announcement board will appear here.

consultas.privateCheck: 🔒 Private query (only the recipient sees it)
consultas.selectRecipientErr: Select the recipient of the private query.
consultas.emptyDesc: Cross-department queries will appear here, with their status and replies.
consultas.privateTitle: Only visible to the sender, the recipient and the Executive

notificaciones.emptyDesc: Queries, replies, announcements and profile changes from the whole team will appear here.

guion.readonlyBanner: View only — only the {dept} department can upload or edit the script. Request changes through Executive Production.
guion.couldNotRegister: The script could not be registered.
guion.aiError: Error processing the script with AI.
guion.aiDetected: AI detected {count} scenes. Review them below and confirm them.
guion.aiReading: AI is reading the script and splitting it into scenes. This can take a couple of minutes…
guion.noPendingScenes: No scenes pending review. Upload a PDF so AI can break it down scene by scene.
guion.heading: Heading
guion.confirmedCount: {n} confirmed scenes · AI will group by location and optimize the order
guion.planGenerated: ✓ Plan generated with {n} shoot days. Open "Shooting schedule" in the General tab to review it.
guion.noConfirmedScenes: No confirmed scenes yet. Confirm them from the Review tab so they appear here in script format.

guiontec.readonlyBanner: View only — only {d1} and {d2} can edit the shooting script. Request changes through Executive Production.
guiontec.couldNotRegister: The shooting script could not be registered.
guiontec.aiError: Error processing the shooting script with AI.
guiontec.aiDetected: AI detected {count} shots. Review and confirm them one by one.
guiontec.aiReading: AI is analyzing the shooting script and extracting shots. This can take a couple of minutes…
guiontec.noPendingShots: No shots pending review. Upload a PDF so AI can break it down automatically.
guiontec.noConfirmedShots: No confirmed shots yet. Upload a PDF or add shots manually and confirm them from the Review tab.
guiontec.addManualHint: Add shots manually one by one. They are confirmed directly without going through review.

orden.readonlyBanner: View only — only {d1} and {d2} can edit the call sheet. Request changes through Executive Production.
orden.title: Shooting order (call sheet)
orden.noDaysDesc: Create the first day to start building the call sheet.
orden.confirmDeleteDay: Delete this shoot day from the shooting order?

escenas.noScenesDesc: {name} is the view where, for each scene, every department's contributions come together. As soon as a script is uploaded and confirmed in {script}, scenes will appear here and {dept} will see how their work connects with the rest, scene by scene.
escenas.noTechBreakdown: No technical breakdown yet — pending from Shooting script
escenas.noProposalsYet: No department has added contributions for Sc. {n} yet. Once Photography, Art, Sound or others add rows referencing this scene in their tools, they'll appear here together — this is the 3D view of the scene.
escenas.sharedDesc: across all 13 departments: scenes come from the {script} breakdown and technical shots from {techScript}. Each confirmed scene is available here for {dept}.

modoRodaje.daysLeft: {n, plural, one {# day} other {# days}} left

equipo.noMembersDesc: When people are added to this department in the project, they will appear here sorted by hierarchy.

accesos.noRequestsDesc: Ask another department for view or edit access to one of their tools, or manage the requests you receive.
accesos.reasonPlaceholder: What do you need this access for?
accesos.errSelectDept: Select the department you are requesting access from.

gestionAccesos.webhookDesc: When an alert marked as {critical} is created, a message will be sent to this URL (compatible with Slack/Discord incoming webhooks). Leave the field empty to disable it.
gestionAccesos.noMembersDesc: When people join {dept}, you will be able to assign them tools and grant Editor/Viewer status here.
gestionAccesos.descDept: Set, per tool in {dept}, who can {edit} and who can only {view}. Changes apply instantly.
gestionAccesos.descGeneral: Confirm, per tool, who in {dept} can {edit} (Editor) and who can only {view} (Viewer).

documentos.noDeptDesc: There is no document catalog defined for this department yet.
documentos.readOnlyDesc: Viewing {dept} documents — read only. Your team edits and publishes these documents from their own panel.
documentos.editDesc: {dept} document workspace. Upload each document when it's ready; the rest of the team will see it published here.
documentos.accessNote: The rest of the team can request view access to a specific document from the {tab} tab.

pipeline.errRequired: Fill in at least the title and the expected date.
pipeline.noMilestonesDesc: Add each department's key milestones (deliveries, shooting plan, contracts, etc.) with their expected date to track compliance.
pipeline.noteDesc: tracks whether each department meets its expected dates. A milestone with no actual date whose expected date has already passed is automatically marked as

archivos.folderExists: A folder with that name already exists
archivos.confirmDeleteFolder: Delete the folder "{name}" and all its files?
archivos.noPreview: A preview cannot be shown for this file
archivos.dropHere: Drag files here or click to upload
archivos.createFolderToStart: Create a folder to start organizing your files

pulso.noProjectDesc: Sign in again or choose a project to see its pulse.
pulso.noPendingTasks: There are no pending tasks in the project.
pulso.noActiveAlerts: No active alerts in the project.
pulso.checklistProgress: {done}/{total} items · {pct}% complete across {n, plural, one {# checklist} other {# checklists}}
pulso.noBudgetData: There is no data in the general budget (top sheet) yet.
pulso.shareDesc: Generate an access link so a client or production company can see the project Pulse, without access to internal tools.

admin.lifecycleDesc: Set the start date for each stage. The end of one stage is the start of the next; the app calculates the current stage and how many days it has been running on its own.
admin.sharedRoleDesc: Add an extra role to a user who already holds more than one role on the team.
admin.roleExists: That user already has that role.
admin.creditsDesc: Shown in the Pulse, visible to the whole team.
admin.creditsUpdated: Credits updated. They are now visible in the project Pulse.
admin.addUserTitle: Add new user to the project
admin.addUserDesc: Generates an invite link. The person sets their own password when opening it.
admin.inviteCreated: Invitation created. Copy the link and send it.

visionado.noViewingDesc: This department does not have any departments assigned to view yet.
visionado.readOnlyDesc: View, read-only, the documents and scenes of the departments {dept} works most closely with.

candidatos.noCandidatesDesc: Load candidates from the "Table" tab to see them here grouped by character.

hoyPanel.stageCompleted: {n, plural, one {# day} other {# days}} completed
hoyPanel.stagePending: {n, plural, one {# day} other {# days}} pending
hoyPanel.stageInProgress: {n, plural, one {# day} other {# days}} (in progress)
hoyPanel.noDatesYet: The Executive has not set the stage dates in Admin yet.
hoyPanel.noPendingTasks: You have no pending tasks right now.

guion-definitivo.desc: Last locked version of the script.

biblia-de-personajes.desc: Arcs, motivations and relationships of each character.

plan-de-rodaje-maestro.desc: Day-by-day calendar of the whole shoot.

shot-list-general.desc: Breakdown of planned shots per day.

calendario-de-ensayos.desc: Read-through and rehearsal sessions with the cast.

plan-de-rodaje-maestro.desc: Production version of the shooting calendar.

stripboard.desc: Scene order by day and location.

catering-y-dietas.desc: Meal and per-diem planning per shooting day.

ordenes-de-rodaje-callsheets.desc: Daily call for the whole crew.

partes-de-produccion-diarios.desc: Summary of what was shot and what's pending each day.

shot-list-desglose-de-planos.desc: Planned shots per scene, type and movement.

plan-de-iluminacion.desc: Lighting diagrams per scene and location.

esquemas-de-set.desc: Camera, lights and equipment layout on set.

look-book-referencias-de-fotografia.desc: Visual references for look and color.

presupuesto-de-arte.desc: Budget assigned to the art department.

proveedores-y-compras.desc: List of suppliers, purchases and rentals.

guion-literario-ultima-version.desc: Current version of the literary script.

historial-de-versiones-y-cambios.desc: Log of script revisions (white, blue, pink...).

desglose-de-escenas-ia.desc: Scenes automatically extracted from the script.

presupuesto-general.desc: Top sheet and chapter breakdown of the project.

presupuesto-por-departamento.desc: Spending allocation and limit for each department.

control-de-costos-cost-report.desc: Budgeted vs. actual, week by week.

flujo-de-caja-cashflow.desc: Projected income and expenses by date.

facturas-emitidas.desc: Invoices issued by the production company.

caja-chica-petty-cash.desc: Minor expenses with their supporting documentation.

rendicion-de-gastos.desc: Settlement of advances and per diems.

contratos-de-reparto.desc: Actors and extras, including image rights assignment.

polizas-de-seguro.desc: Liability, accident, negative and equipment coverage.

listado-de-candidatos.desc: Candidates per character and process status.

resultados-de-audiciones.desc: Notes and decisions for each audition.

guion-con-escenas-marcadas.desc: Script with the actor's own scenes highlighted.

calendario-de-citaciones.desc: Call dates and times per actor.

calendario-editorial.desc: Planning of content to be created.

plan-de-cobertura-bts.desc: Which days and moments to cover.

reportes-de-sonido-por-toma.desc: Levels, notes and valid takes per scene.

notas-de-postsincronizacion.desc: Dialogue lines to re-record in ADR.

notas-de-visionado-dailies.desc: Director's notes on the shot footage.

memoria-de-sostenibilidad.desc: Final report on impact and measures taken.

identidad-grafica.desc: Logos, typefaces and brand guide for the project.

banco-de-assets.desc: Images, videos and artwork for campaigns.

listado-de-medios-y-contactos.desc: Outlets and journalists of interest for the project.

plan-de-distribucion.desc: Planned festivals, platforms and release windows.

common.themeChooserDesc: You can change it later anytime from your account menu.

proyectoNuevo.noInvitesYet: You haven't added any team members yet. You can invite them later from the project.
proyectoNuevo.shareInvitesDesc: Send each person their invitation link. When they open it they'll be able to create their account and will be assigned to the project, department and role.
proyectoNuevo.step1Desc: Share the invitation link with each team member so they can create their account.
proyectoNuevo.step2Desc: Go into the project and set up the tasks and alerts for the first day in "Today".
proyectoNuevo.step3Desc: In "Access management" assign who edits and who can only view each key tool.
proyectoNuevo.step4Desc: Add the first info in Documents and Tools for each department: script, budget, casting, etc.
proyectoNuevo.choosePackTitle: Choose a pack for this new project
proyectoNuevo.choosePackDesc: You already have {n, plural, one {# active project} other {# active projects}}. Additional projects require choosing a pack — full pricing is at <link>cinepack.es/packs.html</link>.
proyectoNuevo.paymentPendingDesc: Card payment isn't connected yet (Stripe still needs to be set up). For now the project is created with "payment pending" status — the CINE PACK team will contact you to arrange it.
proyectoNuevo.noneOfThesePacks: None of these packs fit? (e.g. podcast, event, other format)
proyectoNuevo.customMsgPh: Tell us briefly what you need and we'll put together a custom quote.
proyectoNuevo.buildTeamDesc: Choose the departments that will take part and, optionally, add the people on each team already. An invitation link is generated for each one when the project is created.
proyectoNuevo.useTemplateDesc: Copies the type, departments and custom columns/fields from an existing project's tools.
proyectoNuevo.missingDeptPh: Missing a department? Type it here (e.g. Podcast production)
proyectoNuevo.validNoAccount: Valid email · doesn't have a CINE PACK account yet
proyectoNuevo.errChoosePackOrQuote: Choose a pack or request a custom quote before continuing.
proyectoNuevo.errCompleteFields: Fill in the name and email of every team member, or remove the row.
proyectoNuevo.errWriteRole: Write the role for {name} in "Write a role".
proyectoNuevo.errInviteFailed: Project created, but generating invitations failed: {msg}

crearPerfil.title: Create profile
crearPerfil.formTitle: Complete your profile to get started
crearPerfil.formDesc: This information is required to use CINE PACK: we use it to identify you to your team and for usage statistics in the admin panel. You can't continue without completing it.
crearPerfil.errFillAll: Fill in all fields to continue.

invitacion.notFoundDesc: This invitation link isn't valid. Ask whoever invited you to send you a new one.
invitacion.usedDesc: This invitation has already been used to create an account. If it's yours, you can log in.
invitacion.accountCreatedDesc: You're now part of "{proyecto}". Taking you to your project.
invitacion.confirmEmailDesc: We sent you an email to confirm your account. After confirming, log in and you'll be automatically assigned to "{proyecto}".

perfil.title: My profile
perfil.dataDesc: This information is shared with your team. Any change is logged and visible to the Executive Producer.
perfil.artisticNamePh: How you want to be credited
perfil.errFillCountryProvince: Fill in your country and province of residence and of production.
perfil.successProfileUpdated: Profile updated. The Executive Producer was notified of the changes.
perfil.errPasswordMinLength: Password must be at least 6 characters.
perfil.successPasswordUpdated: Password updated. The Executive Producer was notified of the change.

proyectos.noProjectsDesc: You're not part of any project yet. Contact support to get one assigned.

sugerencias.title: Suggest something
sugerencias.formDesc: What would you change about CINE PACK? Tell us about your experience with the software: what works, what doesn't, and what you'd like to see. Your feedback goes straight to the team.
sugerencias.success: Thanks! Your suggestion was sent to the CINE PACK team.

controlDepto.accessDeniedDesc: Only Department Heads can access this page.
controlDepto.manageDesc: Manage your department's members and tools.
controlDepto.toolsDesc: Tool management by role is done from the tools map in "General".
controlDepto.rolesDesc: Besides the fixed roles, you can create new roles specific to your department.
controlDepto.newRolePh: Missing a role? Type it here
controlDepto.noTools: This department has no tools in the catalog yet.
controlDepto.accessDesc: Assign who edits and who only views each tool in your department.

adminDashboard.chartActivity: Activity over the last 14 days (tool rows + queries)
adminDashboard.chartPeakHours: Hours of the day with most use (top 5 highlighted)
adminDashboard.hintEvents: {v, plural, one {# event} other {# events}} between {h}h and {h2}h

charts.activeUsers: {n, plural, one {# active user} other {# active users}}
charts.noSessionDataYet: No session data yet. Data will accumulate as users use the platform.
charts.usageHoursFootnote: Estimated from the range between each person's first and last action per day — there's no real-time session tracking.
charts.notEnoughDataRegion: Not enough data yet — it's filled in from each user's profile.

adminUsuarios.confirmDelete: Delete {email}'s account? This action can't be undone.
adminUsuarios.confirmImpersonate: You're about to log in as {email}. Your own admin session in this tab will close. Continue?
adminUsuarios.resetLinkCopied:
Reset link copied to clipboard. Send it to {email}:

{link}
adminUsuarios.title: Users ({n})

adminGestion.mockDataNote: Sample data — will connect to the payment gateway once decided.
adminGestion.noTransactionsYet: No transactions yet — this section fills automatically once the payment gateway is connected.
adminGestion.plansDesc: Enabling/disabling is just a flag in the database — there's no payment gateway connected yet, so nothing is charged automatically.

adminSoporte.grantDesc: The support user will be able to view the project in read-only mode. They can't modify any data (write policies still require being a project member).
adminSoporte.noSupportUsers: There are no users with the "support" role yet. Assign one first from the Users section by changing their app_role.

adminFlags.title: Feature flags
adminFlags.desc: Turn features on/off without touching code or redeploying. beta_mode controls whether creating a new project requires payment.
